canonical_name: The room was close and seemed to smell of the stuffy, airless lives these women
one of Gwenhwyfar's ladies was heavily pregnant
a queen who could have other women to sew and spin and weave for her
a woman spinning ... from the time a man
a plump jolly one about her own age
the most skilled of the court midwives
one of your most loyal subjects
that other son she should have borne to me-three sons of mine
this husband she had never wanted
a Camelot to which I might return
a house of nuns where women dwelt, vowed to be virgins of the Christ till they died
every woman who sought to serve her
